political.s: FEC data shows Publix raised ~$235K at the PAC level with a mixed lean, giving to both Republican and Democratic candidates. OpenSecrets reports total 2024-cycle contributions of ~$806K (including individual affiliates) and $490K in lobbying spend, with no outside/dark money spending reported. Historically, Publix has drawn scrutiny for a $670K donation to NRA-endorsed gubernatorial candidate Adam Putnam, reflecting a tilt toward Florida Republicans at the individual/executive level.

charity.s: Publix Super Markets Charities donated $11 million to more than 300 local food banks and nonprofits in 2024, and has contributed over $78 million to hunger-related programs since 2015. The company has donated over 1 billion pounds of food to food banks cumulatively and gave $2 million in disaster relief following Hurricanes Helene and Milton in 2024.
charity.amt: ~$150M+ annually (food donations, cash grants, disaster relief combined)
charity.focus: Hunger relief, food insecurity, youth education, disaster relief, Habitat for Humanity

environment.s: Publix recycled over 606 million pounds of cardboard and 25 million pounds of mixed plastic in 2024, and has planted over 3.2 million trees since 2016 through the Arbor Day Foundation. The company has donated over $8.2 million to environmental nonprofits since 2011 and restores 446 million gallons of water annually through conservation partnerships. Publix has no disclosed CDP score but maintains active sustainability programs across energy, water, and waste reduction.

labor.s: Publix is the largest employee-owned company in the U.S. with over 250,000 associate-owners, offering health benefits, tuition reimbursement, and an employee stock ownership program. In 2023, former assistant department managers filed a federal FLSA collective action alleging unpaid off-the-clock work, though a court denied class certification in late 2024 after finding Publix's wage and hour policies were enforced and not merely nominal. Full-time associate turnover is reported below 5%, far under the industry average of 30%+.

dei.s: Publix maintains an active DEI program including diversity and inclusion training, employee resource groups, a supplier diversity program, and a diversity council. The company has earned a 4.0/5 DEI rating on Glassdoor and is cited as a grocery industry leader in DEI efforts. Publix has maintained its DEI commitments even as many peers have rolled back programs, though no HRC CEI score is publicly disclosed.

animals.s: Publix is a grocery retailer and does not manufacture cosmetics or personal care products requiring animal testing. The company sells a wide range of third-party products and has no disclosed animal testing policy of its own. Animal welfare considerations are not prominently addressed in its CSR reporting.

guns.s: Publix does not sell firearms in its stores. Regarding carry policy, Publix briefly allowed open carry in Florida stores after a 2025 court ruling struck down the state ban, but as of May 2026 reversed course and now asks that only law enforcement openly carry firearms in its stores. Publix does not manufacture guns and has no gun sales program.

privacy.s: Publix collects customer data through its Club Publix loyalty program, website, app, and third-party partners, and shares data with third parties for targeted advertising purposes. The company allows opt-outs via a Privacy Request Center and states it does not sell personal data under applicable state laws, but third-party tracking and ad targeting remain active by default. Pharmacy data is separately protected under HIPAA. No independent EFF or Mozilla privacy audit rating is publicly available.

execPay.s: CEO Kevin Murphy earned approximately $3.4 million in 2024 (his first year as CEO), including a base salary of nearly $2.8 million. As a private, employee-owned company, Publix does not file SEC proxies or disclose a formal CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio; the ratio is therefore not publicly disclosed. Entry-level cashier salaries start around $29K annually, suggesting a notable gap despite the employee-ownership model.
